specific_question: How many corporate team-building events were held by MediConn Solutions in 2024?
answer: There were around 8 corporate team-building events held by MediConn Solutions in 2024.
justification: Team-building events are cultural activities and not related to CPPA compliance or data protection.
dr_question: As the CPPA Act (Bill C-27) awaits parliamentary decision, how can MediConn build preparedness measures to ensure a smooth transition in the event the Act comes into effect by Q2 2026?
